mechanism: Dollar trajectory determines realized commodity cost in local currency for every non-US country. A strengthening dollar amplifies passthrough for importers and partially self-hedges the US. The FX channel is the dominant transmission mechanism in EM (ERPT 0.15-0.40 vs DM 0.03-0.08).
regime_dependence: Always operative, but magnitude depends on ERPT coefficient which varies by country credibility. Most impactful during periods of dollar strengthening coincident with commodity price increases (the commodity-FX doom loop).
